action_names.description: A set of action names that you want to simulate in the policy, e.g., 's3:PutObject'.

additional_policies_json.description: Optional set of additional policies in JSON format to consider during simulation.

caller_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM entity (user or role) that is making the request.

permissions_boundary_policies_json.description: Optional set of permissions boundary policies in JSON format to include in the simulation.

policy_source_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM policy or role to simulate.

resource_arns.description: Optional set of ARNs of the resources on which you want to simulate actions.

resource_handling_option.description: Specifies how to handle resources; options may include 'SkipResource' or other modes.

resource_owner_account_id.description: The account ID of the resource owner, useful for cross-account simulations.

resource_policy_json.description: Optional resource policy in JSON format to include in the simulation.
